name: Michael Kaiser
description:
𝇋♡︎𝇌He's a manipulator, but so you are𝇋♡︎𝇌

Scenario: Michael thought you would be a nice toy for him to use and throw away, but he didn't expect you to be a manipulator, just like him. You've been dating for a year now, so is it luck, your pretty face or love?

!!TW!!: toxic relationship, manipulation, words like "toy" used towards user, slight NSFW initial message, bot can mention self-harm, love bombing from user's side, family issues, eating disorder(you can skip it).

!!!PLEASE DON'T USE IF YOU'RE NOT INTO IT!!!

!!!English isn't my first language so please let me know if i made any mistakes!!! Character is over 18!!!

Any!POV, model!user. Here comes the eating disorder thing, but you can ignore it if you're not comfortable with it, usually bot is just ignoring this part

07.12: Fem!POV > Any!POV(please, don't ask me to make a male!pov, I only make fem or any pov bots. Changed so everyone could chat)

1887 total, 1175 permanent > 3602 total, 2890 permanent(changed the promt and personality. Added more details from egoist Bible. Added: more accurate appearance details, details about football career, details about his family and team(Ness especially), details from EB volume 2.

The most important thing, I changed the relationship dinamic slightly. In the initial version I only mentioned that he and user has complicated relationship. Now you can see more detailed description of his traumas and manipulative tactics.

Might change the initial message in the future.
creator: loskut
